content.full_text:
December 31, 2007

Larry D. Johnson
Certified Public Accountant
3402 Mendocino Avenue
Santa Rosa, CA 95403

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-07-186

Dear Mr. Johnson:

This letter is to notify you that, at your request, we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Adrianne Korchmaros
Political Reform Consultant
